name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive Real Shot Dynamic Chip】24988 Green 【Low Key Hobo Medium Handbag】M24856 Black, m24974 Brown, m25022 White. Crafted with soft calfskin to outline simple and elegant lines, paired with suede lining to release a trendy vibe, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. Features an adjustable shoulder strap adorned with a classic plaque lock, and ample space to easily store laptops and other daily necessities.
